prompt: BLUF this for me: [rambling PM email burying 3-week go-live delay and leadership sign-off requirement]

assertions.name: has_memo_headers
assertions.description: Output contains formal memo headers: MEMORANDUM FOR, FROM, DATE, SUBJECT

assertions.name: bluf_is_first_section
assertions.description: Section 1 is labelled BLUF (not Background, Situation, or any other heading)

assertions.name: bluf_surfaces_delay
assertions.description: The BLUF line mentions the delay (6 July, 3 weeks, or go-live date)

assertions.name: bluf_surfaces_action
assertions.description: The BLUF line mentions leadership sign-off, approval, or decision required

assertions.name: recommendation_assigns_owner
assertions.description: The RECOMMENDATION section names a specific person or role responsible for action

assertions.name: no_preamble
assertions.description: Output does not begin with 'Here is', 'Below is', 'I've rewritten', or similar meta-commentary
